---
title: Results
description: Inspecting scan status, retrieving result data frames, and validating predictions.
reference: inspect_scout
---

## Results

### scan_list
### scan_status
### Status
### Summary
### scan_results_df
### ScanResultsDF
### scan_results_arrow
### ScanResultsArrow

## Validation

### validation_set
### validation_predicate
### ValidationSet
### ValidationCase
### PredicateType
### PredicateFn
### ValidationPredicate
